response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq, but the role demands a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Career timeline shows roughly 10-13 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no cloud/AI strategy leadership, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving organization-wide technical innovation. Title and scope are a significant mismatch for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of community contribution: talks, workshops, open-source platforms (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Falls short of the 15-year requirement and lacks Principal/Director-level IC scope or influence
No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Limited cloud-strategy and customer-advisory experience; no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Emerging AI-agent/MCP experience at current role
